name: Martian Routine
short_description: Martian Routine is casual 3D walk simulator game about astronaut on Mars with puzzles. You will embark on a journey across the Red Planet and walk through the Martian desert landscapes, repairing vehicles and solar panels to survive and move forward.
detailed_description:
Martian Routine is casual 3D walk simulator game about astronaut on Mars with puzzles.
You will embark on a journey across the Red Planet and walk through the Martian desert landscapes, repairing vehicles and solar panels to survive and move forward. Players will explore the landscape and perform repair work by solving puzzles.

Game Features:
Decision-making: Choosing between urgent repairs.
Atmosphere: Full immersion in the atmosphere of Mars and loneliness.
Graphics: 3D
